project_type: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite 5 + Tailwind CSS 3 SPA - Driver Monitoring System dashboard
build_command: npm run dev (vite dev server on port 3000)
verification_instructions: Since INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network prevents npm install, validate code by: 1) Ensuring all imports reference only packages in package.json (react, react-dom, recharts, lucide-react) or relative paths, 2) TypeScript syntax correctness via manual review, 3) Tailwind classes use only defined custom colors (dms-dark, dms-panel, dms-accent, dms-warning, dms-danger, dms-success) plus standard Tailwind utilities.
setup_instructions: npm install (blocked by network). Dependencies in package.json: react 18, react-dom 18, recharts 2.13, lucide-react 0.460, tailwindcss 3.4, vite 5.4, typescript 5.6
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - npm registry blocked. Cannot install packages. No node_modules present. Must write valid TSX code that will compile once dependencies are available. Cannot run npm run dev or npm test. Validate by code review and syntax correctness only.
contribution_requirements: Preserve existing service layer (src/services/, src/hooks/useTelemetry.ts, src/types/dms.ts). Only UI components may be rewritten. Existing components can be fully replaced.
key_patterns: Components use React.FC with typed props. Tailwind classes for styling. Custom colors: dms-dark (#0a0e17), dms-panel (#131a2b), dms-accent (#00d4ff cyan), dms-warning (#ff6b35 amber), dms-danger (#ff2d55 red), dms-success (#00e676 green). useTelemetry hook provides { data: DMSTelemetry | null, connected: boolean, mode: string }. SVG-based gauges for visualization. lucide-react for icons. recharts for charts.
relevant_files: tailwind.config.js (MAY EXTEND - add new theme tokens)
directory_structure: src/components/ - UI components (all replaceable). src/services/ - telemetry providers (preserve). src/hooks/ - useTelemetry hook (preserve). src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces (preserve). public/ - static assets. Root: vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.js, package.json, index.html.
